# List Bug Fixture @doc(tour.list-html-bug)

Strict-mode forbids raw HTML in prose, but a list whose 2nd item contains a tag
must also flag — see PR #20 review (P1). Today this fixture silently passes;
TB-9 flips the validator to walk per-item spans, after which `adoc check`
against this fixture reports `error[parse.raw_html]` on line 7.

- First item is plain prose
- Second item has <span>raw html</span> that should be flagged
- Third item is plain prose
